title: Claude Code Agent Frontmatter Schema
description: Validates YAML frontmatter in agent .md files against Anthropic's documented Claude Code fields. Source: https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/agents-and-tools/claude-code/sub-agents (March 2026). Unrecognized fields are silently ignored by Claude Code at runtime but flagged here to prevent governance metadata from leaking into frontmatter.

name.description: Agent identifier. Kebab-case, lowercase letters and hyphens. Must be unique within scope (project > user > plugin).

description.description: When Claude should delegate to this agent. Include 'use proactively' to encourage automatic invocation. This is the primary routing signal.

model.description: Model selection. Defaults to inherit from parent if omitted.

oneOf.description: Comma-separated tool names. Example: 'Read, Write, Glob, Bash'

tools.description: Allowlist of tools. If omitted, agent inherits ALL tools from parent. Special syntax: Agent(name) restricts spawnable subagents.

disallowedTools.description: Denylist of tools to remove from inherited or specified set.

oneOf.description: Full MCP server config or tool allowlist.

tools.description: Allowlist of specific MCP tools from this server.

mcpServers.description: MCP servers available to this agent. Keys are server names. Value: true (all tools) or object with config/tool allowlist.

permissionMode.description: Permission prompt behavior for this agent.

maxTurns.description: Maximum agentic turns before agent stops.

skills.description: Skill names to preload. Full skill content injected into agent context. Subagents do NOT inherit parent skills.

hooks.description: Lifecycle hooks scoped to this agent. Supports PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SubagentStart, SubagentStop events.

memory.description: Persistent memory scope for cross-session learning.

background.description: Run as background task. Default: false.

isolation.description: Run in temporary git worktree (auto-cleaned if no changes).

color.description: Background color for subagent UI identification. Undocumented but used by /agents command (e.g., 'blue', 'purple'). See github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/8501.
